mechanism_narrative: Persistent high inflation (CPIAUCSL > 3.5%) compresses real equity valuations by increasing discount rates, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns exceed 1.5% in 60%+ of instances where CPIAUCSL > 3.5%, or Rank IC < 0.02 over 3-year rolling window

mechanism_narrative: A 0.5pp+ rise in UNRATE over 3 months signals deteriorating labor market conditions, reducing corporate earnings visibility and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns within 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns are positive in > 55% of triggered instances despite UNRATE increases, or t-test p > 0.1 for return differences

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in INDPRO (industrial production) and GDPC1 (GDP) signal contractionary supply shocks, creating negative S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns are positive in > 50% of cases where both INDPRO and GDPC1 decline > 1% in 3 months

mechanism_narrative: Monetary tightening cycles (FEDFUNDS > 4.5%) increase borrowing costs and reduce corporate investment, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns within 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5d returns exceed 1% in 60%+ of triggered instances, or Rank IC < 0.03 over 2-year window

mechanism_narrative: A 2%+ decline in INDPRO (industrial production) over 3 months indicates weakening manufacturing activity, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns within 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns are positive in > 55% of triggered instances, or t-test p > 0.05 for return differences

mechanism_narrative: Rising HOUST (housing starts) signals strong consumer demand and economic expansion, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5d returns are negative in > 55% of instances with HOUST increases > 1% in 1 month

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in PAYEMS (payrolls) and decline in UNRATE (unemployment) indicates a strong labor market, creating positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns are negative in > 50% of cases where PAYEMS rises > 100k and UNRATE falls > 0.2pp in 1 month

mechanism_narrative: A 0.5pp+ decline in FEDFUNDS signals monetary easing, lowering discount rates and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns within 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns are negative in > 55% of triggered instances, or Rank IC < 0.02 over 3-year window
